content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "打電話到餐廳訂位",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "喂，請問是「好味道餐廳」嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wèi, qǐngwèn shì 'Hǎo Wèidào Cāntīng' ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wei4, qing3 wen4 shi4 'Hao3 Wei4 dao4 Can1 ting1' ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, is this 'Good Taste Restaurant'?",
          "translation_ko": "여보세요, '좋은 맛 식당'이 맞습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "是的，您好。請問有什麼可以幫您的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Shì de, nín hǎo. Qǐngwèn yǒu shénme kěyǐ bāng nín de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "shi4 de, nin2 hao3. qing3 wen4 you3 shen2 me ke3 yi3 bang1 nin2 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, hello. How can I help you?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 안녕하세요. 무엇을 도와드릴까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我想訂位，今天晚上六點，兩位。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng dìngwèi, jīntiān wǎnshàng liù diǎn, liǎng wèi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 xiang3 ding4 wei4, jin1 tian1 wan3 shang4 liu4 dian3, liang3 wei4.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like to make a reservation for two at 6 PM tonight.",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 저녁 6시에 두 명 예약하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，沒問題。請問您貴姓？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, méi wèntí. Qǐngwèn nín guì xìng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de, mei2 wen4 ti2. qing3 wen4 nin2 gui4 xing4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, no problem. May I have your surname?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다. 성함이 어떻게 되십니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我姓林。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xìng Lín.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 xing4 Lin2.",
          "translation_en": "My surname is Lin.",
          "translation_ko": "임 씨입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "林小姐，幫您訂好了。今天晚上六點，兩位，謝謝您。",
          "pinyin": "Lín xiǎojiě, bāng nín dìng hǎo le. Jīntiān wǎnshàng liù diǎn, liǎng wèi, xièxiè nín.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Lin2 xiao3 jie3, bang1 nin2 ding4 hao3 le. jin1 tian1 wan3 shang4 liu4 dian3, liang3 wei4, xie4 xie4 nin2.",
          "translation_en": "Miss Lin, your reservation is confirmed. Two at 6 PM tonight. Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "임 선생님, 예약 완료되었습니다. 오늘 저녁 6시, 두 분, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝，再見。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè, zàijiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "xie4 xie4, zai4 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, goodbye.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 안녕히 계세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer do?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Ordered food delivery", "Made a reservation", "Canceled a reservation"],
          "options_ko": ["음식 배달 주문", "예약을 했다", "예약을 취소했다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on the tone and polite phrasing.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice calling a restaurant to make a reservation. Use the phrases from the dialogue."
    },
    {
      "title": "打電話到診所掛號",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "喂，請問是「安心診所」嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wèi, qǐngwèn shì 'Ānxīn Zhěnsuǒ' ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wei4, qing3 wen4 shi4 'An1 xin1 Zhen3 suo3' ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, is this 'Anxin Clinic'?",
          "translation_ko": "여보세요, '안심 클리닉'이 맞습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃台",
          "text": "是的，您好。請問要掛號嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Shì de, nín hǎo. Qǐngwèn yào guàhào ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "shi4 de, nin2 hao3. qing3 wen4 yao4 gua4 hao4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, hello. Would you like to register?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 안녕하세요. 접수하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "對，我想掛號。今天下午可以看診嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ xiǎng guàhào. Jīntiān xiàwǔ kěyǐ kànzhěn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, wo3 xiang3 gua4 hao4. jin1 tian1 xia4 wu3 ke3 yi3 kan4 zhen3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I'd like to register. Can I see a doctor this afternoon?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 접수하고 싶습니다. 오늘 오후에 진료 가능합니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃台",
          "text": "可以的。請問您哪裡不舒服？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ de. Qǐngwèn nín nǎlǐ bù shūfu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ke3 yi3 de. qing3 wen4 nin2 na3 li3 bu4 shu1 fu?",
          "translation_en": "Yes. May I ask what's bothering you?",
          "translation_ko": "가능합니다. 어디가 불편하십니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "我喉嚨痛，有一點發燒。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ hóulóng tòng, yǒu yīdiǎn fāshāo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 hou2 long2 tong4, you3 yi1 dian3 fa1 shao1.",
          "translation_en": "I have a sore throat and a slight fever.",
          "translation_ko": "목이 아프고 열이 조금 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃台",
          "text": "好的，幫您掛下午三點。請帶健保卡，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, bāng nín guà xiàwǔ sān diǎn. Qǐng dài jiànbǎo kǎ, xièxiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de, bang1 nin2 gua4 xia4 wu3 san1 dian3. qing3 dai4 jian4 bao3 ka3, xie4 xie4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll register you for 3 PM this afternoon. Please bring your health insurance card, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 오후 3시로 접수해 드리겠습니다. 건강보험증을 지참해 주세요, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "好的，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 de, xie4 xie4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What time is the appointment?",
          "question_ko": "예약 시간은 몇 시입니까?",
          "options_en": ["2 PM", "3 PM", "4 PM"],
          "options_ko": ["오후 2시", "오후 3시", "오후 4시"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on the medical vocabulary and polite tone.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice calling a clinic to make an appointment. Describe your symptoms and ask for a time."
    },
    {
      "title": "打電話給朋友約見面",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "喂，小美，你在嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wèi, Xiǎoměi, nǐ zài ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wei4, Xiao3 mei3, ni3 zai4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, Xiaomei, are you there?",
          "translation_ko": "여보세요, 샤오메이, 있어?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我在啊。怎麼了？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zài a. Zěnme le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 zai4 a. zen3 me le?",
          "translation_en": "I'm here. What's up?",
          "translation_ko": "응, 있어. 왜?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這個週末你有空嗎？我們一起去看電影好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Zhège zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zhe4 ge zhou1 mo4 ni3 you3 kong4 ma? wo3 men yi1 qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4 ying3 hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Are you free this weekend? How about we go see a movie together?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말에 시간 있어? 같이 영화 보러 갈래?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！星期六下午可以嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Xīngqīliù xiàwǔ kěyǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 a! xing1 qi1 liu4 xia4 wu3 ke3 yi3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Sure! Is Saturday afternoon okay?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아! 토요일 오후 괜찮아?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "可以。我們約下午兩點在電影院門口見面，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ. Wǒmen yuē xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu jiànmiàn, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ke3 yi3. wo3 men yue1 xia4 wu3 liang3 dian3 zai4 dian4 ying3 yuan4 men2 kou3 jian4 mian4, hao3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Okay. Let's meet at the movie theater entrance at 2 PM, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "응. 영화관 입구에서 오후 2시에 만나자, 괜찮아?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題。到時候見！",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Dào shíhou jiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 wen4 ti2. dao4 shi2 hou jian4!",
          "translation_en": "No problem. See you then!",
          "translation_ko": "알겠어. 그때 보자!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，再見！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, zàijiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, zai4 jian4!",
          "translation_en": "Okay, goodbye!",
          "translation_ko": "응, 안녕!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What are they planning to do?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 무엇을 하기로 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Go shopping", "Watch a movie", "Eat dinner"],
          "options_ko": ["쇼핑 가기", "영화 보기", "저녁 먹기"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on casual and friendly intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice calling a friend to make plans. Use the dialogue as a model."
    }
  ]
}
